channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SPVGLOBAL] SPV Global Trading Ltd to Sell 54.90% Stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries Ltd to Gravita India Limited for INR 310.17 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SPV Global Trading Ltd has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement with Gravita India Limited to sell 22,79,410 equity shares representing 54.90% stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited, a material subsidiary, for a Purchase Consideration of INR 310.17 Crores. The transaction is expected to be completed by 31st March 2026.

  • SPV Global Trading Ltd to sell 54.90% stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries Ltd to Gravita India Limited
  • Transaction value is INR 310.17 Crores (Indian Rupees Three Hundred Ten Crore and Seventeen Lakhs)
  • The sale is expected to be completed by 31st March 2026
  • Gravita India Limited is not part of the promoter/promoter group/group companies
  • The transaction does not fall under related party transactions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPV Global Trading Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BIJHANS] Bijoy Hans Ltd. Board Meeting on March 17, 2026: Name Change, Borrowing Limit Increase, Remuneration Revisions, and More
item.description:
Bijoy Hans Ltd. has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for March 17, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving various matters such as a proposal for changing the company's name, increasing borrowing limits, authorizing loans, guarantees, and investments, revising remuneration for the Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer, changing the designation of a Non-Executive Director to Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer, adopting a new set of Articles of Association, increasing the authorized share capital, and appointing a Scrutinizer for the postal ballot process. The meeting will be held in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Proposal for changing the company's name
  • Increasing borrowing limits under Section 180 of the Companies Act, 2013
  • Authorization to make loans, give guarantees, provide security, or make investments under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013
  • Revision in remuneration for the Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer
  • Change in designation of a Non-Executive Director to Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIJOY HANS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAHLOG] Mahindra Logistics Faces Rs. 25.48 Million GST Penalty for FY 2021-2022
item.description:
Mahindra Logistics Ltd. has received an Order from the Deputy Commissioner, GST, Haridwar, Uttarakhand, imposing a penalty of Rs. 25,48,124.86/- for alleged excess Input Tax Credit claimed for the FY 2021-2022. The Company is hopeful of a favourable outcome at the next adjudicating authority/tribunal level and does not expect the Order to have any material financial impact.

  • Mahindra Logistics Ltd. has been imposed a penalty of Rs. 25,48,124.86/- by the Deputy Commissioner, GST, Haridwar, Uttarakhand
  • The penalty is in relation to alleged excess Input Tax Credit claimed by the Company for the FY 2021-2022
  • The Company is hopeful of a favourable outcome at the next adjudicating authority/tribunal level
  • The Company does not expect the Order to have any material financial impact
  • The penalty includes tax demand, interest, and penalty amounting to a total of Rs. 75,70,513.80/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahindra Logistics Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SPVGLOBAL] SPV Global Trading Ltd. to Sell 54.90% Stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries for INR 310.17 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SPV Global Trading Ltd. announced the approval of a Share Purchase Agreement to sell 22,79,410 equity shares representing 54.90% stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited to Gravita India Limited for a purchase consideration of approximately INR 310.17 Crores. The transaction is expected to be completed by 31st March, 2026. The sale is not a related party transaction and Gravita India Limited does not form part of the promoter, promoter group or group companies.

  • SPV Global Trading Ltd. to sell 54.90% stake in Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited
  • Stake sale to Gravita India Limited for approximately INR 310.17 Crores
  • Transaction expected to be completed by 31st March, 2026
  • Not a related party transaction
  • Gravita India Limited does not form part of promoter, promoter group or group companies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPV Global Trading Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [GRAVITA] Gravita India Ltd Acquires Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited for INR 559.08 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gravita India Limited has entered into definitive documents for the acquisition of 41,08,639 equity shares of Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited, representing ~98.95% of its paid-up share capital for a total consideration of INR 559.08 Crores. RMIL is engaged in the business of manufacturing of copper & copper alloy products with exports to several countries. The acquisition is part of Gravita's strategic initiative to expand its presence and strengthen its capabilities.

  • Gravita India Ltd to acquire Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited for INR 559.08 Crores.
  • The acquisition represents ~98.95% of RMIL's paid-up share capital.
  • RMIL is engaged in the manufacturing of copper & copper alloy products with a significant global presence.
  • The acquisition is part of Gravita's strategic initiative to expand its presence and strengthen its capabilities.
  • The transaction is expected to be completed by March 31, 2026, or such other date as may be mutually agreed between the parties.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRAVITA INDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [LANDMARK] Landmark Cars Expands Hyderabad Aftersales Network with New Mahindra & Mahindra Workshop
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Landmark Cars Limited, a leading premium automotive retail network in India, is set to expand its footprint in Hyderabad by opening a new Mahindra & Mahindra workshop in Kompally. This workshop will help Landmark in catering to high demand witnessed in the existing two M&M workshops in Hyderabad. This addition will take the total outlet count of Mahindra & Mahindra outlets to 8 in Hyderabad and 12 overall. This expansion is in line with Landmark’s strategy of deepening its engagement within each brand and geography, building a robust network impact over time and enhancing its standing as a trusted partner of choice for leading OEMs.

  • Landmark Cars Limited is expanding its footprint in Hyderabad with a new Mahindra & Mahindra workshop.
  • The new workshop will cater to high demand witnessed in the existing two M&M workshops in Hyderabad.
  • This addition will take the total outlet count of Mahindra & Mahindra outlets to 8 in Hyderabad and 12 overall.
  • This expansion is in line with Landmark’s strategy of deepening its engagement within each brand and geography.
  • Landmark Cars Limited is a leading premium automotive retail network in India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Landmark Cars Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MINDSPACE] Mindspace Business Parks REIT to Participate in ARIA's Flagship Mumbai Conference on March 16, 2026
item.description:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT, named in the text, has informed the stock exchange about its participation in a conference organized by ARIA at JW Marriott and Aspire Sahar, Mumbai on March 16, 2026. The conference will be in a one-on-one physical interaction format. The REIT's management will use a specific presentation, which is available on the company's website. Please note that the meeting schedule is subject to change due to reasons such as changes from investors, organizers, or the management team.

  • Mindspace Business Parks REIT to participate in ARIA's flagship Mumbai conference on March 16, 2026
  • The conference will be held at JW Marriott and Aspire Sahar, Mumbai
  • The event is a one-on-one physical interaction type
  • A specific presentation will be used by the management
  • The presentation is available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mindspace Business Parks REIT | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NATCAPSUQ] Natural Biogenex and Fermbox Bio Enter Strategic Framework and Manufacturing Agreements
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Natural Biogenex Private Limited, a subsidiary of Natural Capsules Limited, has executed definitive Framework and Contract Manufacturing Agreements with Fermbox Bio Private Limited to jointly advance fermentation-based Contract Development and Manufacturing (CDMO) services. The partnership positions the Company to serve global biotechnology and biopharma clients with integrated, GMP-compliant manufacturing capacity and enhanced process efficiency. The global biotech and biopharma CDMO market continues to present strong growth opportunities, driven by rising demand, increasing outsourcing, and more complex biomanufacturing requirements. India is strategically placed to capture a meaningful share of this opportunity, tapping into its bio- manufacturing strength and a growing CDMO sector.

  • Natural Biogenex and Fermbox Bio have entered into strategic Framework and Manufacturing Agreements.
  • The partnership aims to advance fermentation-based Contract Development and Manufacturing (CDMO) services.
  • The collaboration will serve global biotechnology and biopharma clients with integrated, GMP-compliant manufacturing capacity and enhanced process efficiency.
  • India's CDMO sector is growing, and this partnership aims to tap into this opportunity.
  • The global biotech and biopharma CDMO market is presenting strong growth opportunities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATURAL CAPSULES LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy Office Parks REIT Maintains Stable Credit Ratings from CRISIL and CARE
item.description:
Embassy Office Parks REIT, a real estate investment trust, has maintained its stable credit ratings from CRISIL Ratings Limited and CARE Ratings Limited. CRISIL has revalidated the credit rating of CRISIL Al+ for the Commercial Paper issued/to be issued by Embassy REIT, while CARE has reaffirmed the credit rating of CARE A1+ for the Commercial Paper. These ratings indicate a very strong degree of safety regarding timely payment of financial obligations and carry the lowest credit risk. The ratings are valid throughout the life of the Commercial Paper Programme with a maximum maturity of one year.

  • Embassy Office Parks REIT maintains CRISIL Al+ credit rating for Commercial Paper
  • CRISIL revalidates credit rating for Commercial Paper
  • Embassy REIT holds CARE A1+ credit rating for Commercial Paper
  • CARE reaffirms credit rating for Commercial Paper
  • Ratings indicate very strong degree of safety for timely payment of financial obligations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Investment

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy Office Parks REIT's Commercial Paper Rating Revalidated as CRISIL A1+ by CRISIL Ratings
item.description:
Embassy Office Parks REIT has received a revalidation of the credit rating CRISIL A1+ for its Commercial Paper issued/to be issued by CRISIL Ratings Limited. The rating was revalidated for a period of 5 years, i.e., until 05-02-2026. The ISINs INE041014049 and INE041014056 have been redeemed as of the date of the letter. CRISIL Ratings continuously monitor and review all ratings assigned, and the rating assigned to Embassy Office Parks REIT's Commercial Paper is considered to have a very strong degree of safety regarding timely payment of financial obligations.

  • Embassy Office Parks REIT's Commercial Paper rating revalidated as CRISIL A1+ by CRISIL Ratings
  • Rating revalidation is valid until 05-02-2026
  • ISINs INE041014049 and INE041014056 have been redeemed
  • CRISIL Ratings continuously monitor and review all ratings assigned
  • CRISIL A1+ rating indicates a very strong degree of safety regarding timely payment of financial obligations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Investment
